author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Opal Rayfam - AVAILABLE NOW

The universe's infinite information, all at your fingertips. Discover the Opal Rayfam--AVAILABLE NOW! 

Benefits of purchasing:
  FREE Scanning in SAGE Labs
  Receive a FREE Ogrika Niruch with EVERY purchase before November 27 (Note: These ships will be sent to primary market purchasers of the ship on November 28.)
  First Small Data Runner and second Data Runner ever released
  Whiteboxed in UE5

IMPORTANT: With the sale of the Opal Rayfam, we're introducing a new policy on new asset releases. For the first 30 days of an asset release, secondary trading won't be allowed.
